error: the application terminated unexpectedly

Reason: runtime error: index out of range [3] with length 3

 | goroutine 1 [running]:
 | main.explode(...)
 | 	/app/cmd/example-cli/main.go:42 +0x1d
 | main.run(0xc0000b6000)
 | 	/app/cmd/example-cli/main.go:28 +0x94
 | main.main()
 | 	/app/cmd/example-cli/main.go:17 +0x64

This is likely a bug. Please help us fix it by reporting this crash at:

    https://github.com/bitwizeshift/go-cli/issues/new

Include the stack trace above and a short description of what you were
doing when it happened.
